name: Password Spray Followed by Success
hypothesis: Password spraying may show many users failing from one source followed by at least one success.
triage_steps: Check approved change or expected business activity
response_actions: Open an incident case if suspicious
Contain affected identity, host, or resource if compromise is confirmed
logic: count_distinct(user failures by source_ip over 15m) >= 20 and success from same source within 30m
